title: GCP access token expiry not documented
description: GCP access tokens (gcloud auth print-access-token) expire after 1 hour. GcpSmBackend reads the token once at from_uri() time. A long-running process will see mysterious HTTP 401 errors after an hour with no useful error message. The module doc says 'obtain a token with gcloud auth print-access-token' but says nothing about expiry or re-auth. — Maintenance consequence: will generate a class of user reports that look like intermittent failures but are actually token TTL exhaustion. Fix: add a note to the module doc about the 1-hour TTL and the workaround (reconstruct the backend, or use a service account key / Workload Identity for production).
